tagline: Party backdrops with color plans that behave.

hero.title: PopArc party backdrop styling hero image
hero.alt: A party stylist adjusts a colorful balloon garland arch and fabric backdrop in a modern event space.

contact.serviceArea: Balloon garlands, party backdrops, shower installs, birthday arches, corporate photo corners, color plans, delivery, setup, and teardown options across town

copy.eyebrow: Balloon installs with color, scale, and cleanup handled
copy.heroTitle: Your party backdrop should look planned, not panicked.
copy.heroText: PopArc designs balloon garlands, backdrop moments, and photo-ready party corners with clear sizing, color notes, setup timing, and teardown options.
copy.introTitle: A playful install still needs grown-up logistics.
copy.introText: We confirm venue rules, ceiling or wall access, color references, backdrop size, install window, and what happens after the last photo.
copy.proofTitle: Backdrop proof before the camera roll
copy.quoteText: Send your date, venue, install window, palette, backdrop inspiration, and rough guest flow. We will recommend the right size and setup path.

services.title: Mini Moment
services.text: A smaller garland, plinth, or photo corner for homes, restaurants, and tight event spaces.

services.title: Statement Backdrop
services.text: A fuller arch or wall moment with color planning, install notes, and photo-ready proportions.

services.title: Full Party Corner
services.text: Backdrop, garland, plinth styling, optional florals, and teardown planning for bigger guest flow.

process.title: Send the space
process.text: Photos, wall size, install window, access rules, and color references help us choose a realistic build.

process.title: Lock the palette
process.text: We translate inspiration into balloon tones, backdrop fabric, and accent pieces that work in the room.

process.title: Install and hand off
process.text: We arrive with the build plan, protect the space, style the final details, and confirm teardown.
